description_long: This object is a tall, slender wooden vase filled with an arrangement of dried ornamental plants and flowers. The vase has a polished, natural wood grain finish and stands on a small, rounded pedestal base. The floral arrangement features a mix of long, thin stems, some with seed pods, and others with colorful dried flowers in shades of red, pink, purple, and beige. The dried plants are arranged in a loose, organic fashion, with some stems arching outward and others standing more upright. The overall look is rustic and decorative, suitable for adding a natural touch to an urban environment. There are no visible labels or tags attached to the vase or the plants.
description: A tall, polished wooden vase holds a colorful arrangement of dried ornamental flowers and grasses, creating a rustic decorative accent.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full spread of the dried arrangement, with red and pink flowers prominently visible and the wood grain of the vase clearly displayed.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the narrow profile of the vase and the vertical alignment of the stems, with more beige and purple elements visible.
description_view_2: From this angle, the arrangement appears more fanned out, with the red and pink flowers extending to the left and the wood grain pattern of the vase still visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the height of the tallest stems and the rounded base of the vase, with the red flower heads more clustered to the right.
